seededNote: Seeded pro-forma operating atom for the proposed (not-yet-built) Nelray redevelopment. Numbers are representative seed values shaped like the operator's book, not actuals. Metric naming is consistent with the six existing mockups in mox_html_original/.

payload.label: Nelray 5-Story Underwrite (seed pro forma)
payload.basis: projected (ground-up redevelopment; no operating history yet)

metrics.label: NOI vs underwrite
metrics.note: Not yet measurable; building is proposed. Tracked once operating.

metrics.label: Underwritten unit count
metrics.note: ~20 units at MF-3 density cap before bonuses; subject to the entitlement finding.

payload.underwriteConfidenceLabel: Underwrite confidence: baseline (projected; not calibrated on this asset's outcomes)

provenance.produced: representative operating line items in mockup-consistent naming
provenance.citation: mox_html_original/mox_04_invest (1).html and mox_01_command (1).html (NOI vs underwrite, Portfolio occupancy, Controllable line items, Monthly close cycle, Rent lift, Expense load, $/u rents, cap rate).

reasoning: Seeded pro-forma operating atom so the deal molecule can compose the operating side of the two-flywheel model. The building is proposed (no operating history), so values are projected seed numbers shaped like the operator's book; the metric keys/labels mirror the existing mockups. Per the honesty guardrails the underwrite confidence is BASELINE / projected, not 'calibrated' (the mockups' 'calibrated' chip applies to the 18-asset owned book, which has earned outcomes; this new deal has none yet). As a private operating atom it is tenant-private and is never pooled into shared ground truth.

confidence.stateNote: Seed projection for a not-yet-built asset. Baseline; explicitly NOT calibrated/earned. Will earn calibration only after the asset operates and outcomes are observed.
